moments.title: England's World Cup Clash
moments.blurb: England faces Croatia in a crucial FIFA World Cup 2026 group stage match tomorrow, June 17th.

angles.name: Match Build-up
angles.copy: Gareth Southgate's Lions are ready! England take on Croatia tomorrow in their next World Cup group stage fixture. How are we feeling, Nation?

angles.name: Score Predictions
angles.copy: It's England vs. Croatia tomorrow in the World Cup! Score predictions, please. Will the Three Lions roar to victory?

moments.title: World Cup Heavyweights in Action
moments.blurb: Today, June 16th, sees two football giants in action at the FIFA World Cup 2026: France plays Senegal and Argentina takes on Algeria.

angles.name: France Game
angles.copy: It's a big day for football fans! France kicks off their World Cup campaign against Senegal today. Can Mbappé lead them to glory?

angles.name: Argentina Game
angles.copy: Messi and Argentina are in action at the World Cup today, taking on Algeria. Will the reigning champions start strong?

moments.title: Glastonbury Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The iconic Glastonbury Festival returns to Worthy Farm, running from June 24th to 28th, 2026.

angles.name: Festival Countdown
angles.copy: Just 8 days until the gates open! Glastonbury Festival 2026 is almost here. Who's got their wellies packed and ready for Worthy Farm?

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: The biggest festival on earth is just around the corner! What acts are you most excited to see at Glastonbury next week?

moments.title: Isle of Wight Festival Starts
moments.blurb: The Isle of Wight Festival takes place from June 18th to 21st, 2026, featuring a lineup of pop, rock, and electronic acts.

angles.name: Festival Kick-off
angles.copy: The Isle of Wight Festival kicks off in two days! Who's heading to Seaclose Park for a weekend of incredible music?

angles.name: Lineup Excitement
angles.copy: Get ready for the Isle of Wight Festival starting Thursday! What's on your must-see list this year?

moments.title: Nile Rodgers & CHIC at Hampton Court
moments.blurb: Nile Rodgers & CHIC are performing at the Hampton Court Palace Festival on June 17th, as part of the series running until June 19th.

angles.name: Disco Night
angles.copy: Get ready to dance! Nile Rodgers & CHIC bring the disco classics to Hampton Court Palace Festival tomorrow night. Pure joy!

angles.name: Iconic Performance
angles.copy: An evening with a legend: Nile Rodgers & CHIC live at Hampton Court Palace Festival tomorrow. What's your favourite CHIC track?

moments.title: TRNSMT Festival in Glasgow
moments.blurb: Glasgow Green hosts the TRNSMT Festival from June 19th to 21st, with headliners including Lewis Capaldi, Calvin Harris, and The Cure.

angles.name: Scotland's Big Gig
angles.copy: TRNSMT Festival kicks off in Glasgow this Thursday! Scotland, are you ready for Lewis Capaldi, Calvin Harris, The Cure and more?

angles.name: Who Are You Seeing?
angles.copy: Just a few days until TRNSMT takes over Glasgow Green! Who's excited for the incredible lineup? Tell us who you're seeing!

moments.title: Parklife Festival in Manchester
moments.blurb: Parklife Festival runs from June 20th to 21st at Heaton Park, Manchester, bringing a huge lineup of artists.

angles.name: Manchester Festival
angles.copy: Parklife is almost here! Heaton Park is about to light up for a massive weekend of music. Who's joining the party?

angles.name: Weekend Vibes
angles.copy: Only a few days until Parklife transforms Manchester! What are your festival essentials for this weekend?

moments.title: Happy 84th to Paul McCartney
moments.blurb: Legendary Beatle and Wings frontman, Paul McCartney, celebrates his 84th birthday on June 18th.

angles.name: Beatles Icon
angles.copy: An absolute legend turns 84 on Thursday! Happy Birthday to the incredible Paul McCartney. What's your favourite Beatles or Wings song?

angles.name: Living Legend
angles.copy: From Penny Lane to world tours, Paul McCartney is 84 on Thursday and still inspiring millions. Send your birthday wishes!

moments.title: Lionel Richie Turns 77
moments.blurb: The iconic singer-songwriter Lionel Richie celebrates his 77th birthday on June 20th.

source.l: Off The Wall School Of Music

angles.name: Hello, is it his birthday?
angles.copy: Hello! Is it Lionel Richie's 77th birthday we're looking for? Yes it is, this Saturday! What's your go-to Lionel track?

angles.name: Motown to Solo Star
angles.copy: From The Commodores to a phenomenal solo career, Lionel Richie turns 77 on Saturday. Celebrate with his greatest hits all day!

moments.title: Lana Del Rey's 41st Birthday
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Lana Del Rey celebrates her 41st birthday on June 21st.

angles.name: Indie Icon
angles.copy: Happy 41st Birthday to the mesmerising Lana Del Rey this Friday! What's your favourite lyric from her?

angles.name: Birthday Vibes
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate Lana Del Rey's 41st birthday this Friday! Which of her tracks is essential listening today?

moments.title: Cyndi Lauper Turns 73
moments.blurb: Pop icon Cyndi Lauper celebrates her 73rd birthday on June 22nd.

angles.name: Girls Just Wanna Have Fun
angles.copy: She's so unusual and she turns 73 this Saturday! Happy Birthday to the one and only Cyndi Lauper. What's your favourite 80s anthem from her?

angles.name: Pop Pioneer
angles.copy: From 'Girls Just Want To Have Fun' to 'Time After Time', Cyndi Lauper is 73 this Saturday! Which of her hits takes you back?

moments.title: Jason Mraz's 49th Birthday
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer-songwriter Jason Mraz celebrates his 49th birthday on June 23rd.

angles.name: Good Vibes Birthday
angles.copy: It's a happy 49th birthday to the 'I'm Yours' singer, Jason Mraz, this Sunday! What's your favourite feel-good track from him?

angles.name: Tune In
angles.copy: Celebrating Jason Mraz's 49th birthday this Sunday! We'll be playing his best all day. Which song are you hoping to hear?

moments.title: Solange Knowles Turns 40
moments.blurb: Singer, songwriter, and actress Solange Knowles celebrates her 40th birthday on June 24th.

angles.name: Birthday Queen
angles.copy: Happy 40th Birthday to the incredible Solange Knowles this Monday! What's your favourite track from her amazing catalogue?

angles.name: Celebrating Solange
angles.copy: Solange turns 40 this Monday! Let's celebrate her unique sound and style. What's the Solange song you can't get enough of?

moments.title: Curt Smith of Tears for Fears Turns 65
moments.blurb: Curt Smith, co-founder, bassist, and vocalist of the iconic band Tears for Fears, celebrates his 65th birthday on June 24th.

angles.name: Tears for Fears Icon
angles.copy: Happy 65th Birthday this Monday to Curt Smith of Tears for Fears! What's your favourite hit from the legendary duo?

angles.name: Shout Out
angles.copy: Shout out to Curt Smith of Tears for Fears, turning 65 this Monday! Which of their timeless tracks is your absolute favourite?

moments.title: Ariana Grande's 33rd Birthday
moments.blurb: Pop superstar Ariana Grande celebrates her 33rd birthday on June 26th.

angles.name: Pop Queen
angles.copy: Happy 33rd Birthday to the one and only Ariana Grande this Wednesday! What's your all-time favourite Ariana hit?

angles.name: Celebrating Ariana
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate Ariana Grande's 33rd birthday this Wednesday! Which of her incredible songs gets you singing along?

moments.title: Love Island UK Continues
moments.blurb: The 13th series of Love Island UK, which started on June 1st, 2026, continues with new episodes airing Sunday to Friday at 9pm on ITV2 and ITVX.

angles.name: Villa Drama
angles.copy: The drama in the Love Island villa is heating up! Who's your favourite couple right now, and who do you think is playing a game?

angles.name: Tonight's Episode
angles.copy: Another night, another dose of Love Island! What are your predictions for tonight's episode? Any bombshells on the way?

moments.title: Clarkson's Farm Season 5 Finale
moments.blurb: The final episodes (7 & 8) of Clarkson's Farm Season 5 are available to stream on Prime Video from June 17th.

angles.name: New Episodes Drop
angles.copy: Get ready for more chaos at Diddly Squat! The final episodes of Clarkson's Farm Season 5 drop tomorrow on Prime Video. What do you hope to see?

angles.name: Farm Fun
angles.copy: Tomorrow, it's the last two episodes of Clarkson's Farm Season 5! Who's catching up on Jeremy and Kaleb's latest adventures?

moments.title: New Drama 'A Woman of Substance'
moments.blurb: A new period drama, 'A Woman of Substance', based on Barbara Taylor Bradford's novel, premieres on BritBox on June 24th.

angles.name: New Series Alert
angles.copy: Period drama fans, mark your calendars! 'A Woman of Substance' premieres on BritBox next Monday. Who's ready for a new epic?

angles.name: Book Adaptation
angles.copy: If you loved the book, get ready for the screen! 'A Woman of Substance' starts on BritBox on June 24th. Will you be watching?

moments.title: Summer Solstice Approaches
moments.blurb: The Summer Solstice, marking the longest day of the year in the Northern Hemisphere, occurs on Sunday, June 21st, at 9:24 AM BST.

angles.name: Longest Day
angles.copy: Get ready for the longest day of the year! The Summer Solstice is this Sunday, June 21st. How will you be making the most of the extra daylight?

angles.name: Sunrise Plans
angles.copy: The Summer Solstice is just around the corner! Will you be catching the sunrise or enjoying the late sunset this Sunday?
